message:
test: strengthen CI gate, QA policy, and logging test coverage

ci_full_suite_gate.rs:
- Add phase1_matrix_validation_path_configured,
  phase1_matrix_validation_generated_at_fresh check IDs to evidence contract
  wiring test
- Add "source", "source_path", and "phase1_matrix_validation" string
  assertions for scenario cell status artifact completeness

qa_docs_policy_validation.rs:
- Add phase1_matrix_validation_path_configured and
  phase1_matrix_validation_generated_at_fresh to fail-closed conditions list
- New test: run_all_claim_integrity_python_block_compiles — extracts the
  embedded Python heredoc from run_all.sh and verifies it compiles with
  python3 -m py_compile, catching syntax errors before CI

tests/common/logging.rs:
- Rename ci_correlation_id_absent_when_env_unset →
  ci_correlation_id_reflects_environment_value — test now reads
  CI_CORRELATION_ID from env and asserts logger matches it, rather than
  assuming the env var is always absent (which fails in CI where it's set)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
